hero.headline: Digital systems that grow your business
hero.subheadline: We implement AI Sales Engineering. Our system contacts, qualifies and books your leads in under 60 seconds, eliminating manual work.
hero.headline_line1: How much money are you leaving

pains.heading: The Cost of
pains.subtitle: Every minute without a response is a lead going cold. This is what the real problem looks like.

pain1.title: Manual processes stealing your time
pain1.body: Your team spends hours on repetitive tasks: copying data between spreadsheets, sending follow-up emails, building reports by hand. Time that could go to work that actually matters.

pain2.title: Decisions without real-time data
pain2.body: Your information is scattered across different tools and you have to wait until month-end to know how the business is doing. Late decisions cost money.

pain3.title: Technology that doesn't adapt to your business
pain3.body: You use generic tools that force you to adapt your processes to them, instead of the other way around. Every workaround is debt that accumulates.

step1.title: Diagnose
step1.description: We start by understanding your business: current processes, real pain points, growth objectives. No assumptions — only listening and analysis.

step2.title: Build
step2.description: We develop the solution in short iterations with real deliverables. You see progress from the first week, not at the end of the project.

step3.title: Grow
step3.description: We measure results, adjust, and scale. The system evolves with your business so growth doesn't find you without the infrastructure to support it.

retainer.heading: Ongoing support
retainer.body: The launch is just the beginning. Businesses that grow need technology that evolves with them: new features, optimizations, fast response to issues.
retainer.body2: We work with select clients on a monthly retainer model, as an extended technical team that already knows your system and can act without friction.

founder1.name: Founder 1
founder1.bio: Software architect with over 10 years building systems for growing businesses. Specialist in scalable system design and product teams.
founder1.imageAlt: Photo of Founder 1, co-founder and CTO of nexdevp

founder2.name: Founder 2
founder2.bio: Business strategist focused on digital transformation. Has guided more than 30 companies in implementing technology that generates measurable results.
founder2.imageAlt: Photo of Founder 2, co-founder and CEO of nexdevp

leadCapture.heading: Ready to grow your business?
leadCapture.subheading: A 30-minute call is enough to understand if we can help you. No commitment, no pressure.

meta.siteDescription: We design and implement digital systems that grow your business. Consulting, development and automation.

booking.dialogDescription: Choose the time that works best for you for a free diagnostic call.

hero.sub: We build custom software and AI-powered sales systems — so you operate better and never miss an opportunity.
hero.counter_label:
Opportunities lost
this week by not automating
hero.counter_note: AI never sleeps. Your team does.

beforeAfter.heading: What changes when
beforeAfter.problem2: Leads coming in with no one responding
beforeAfter.solution2: AI agent that responds in 60 seconds
beforeAfter.solution4: Operations that scale on their own

pillars.heading: Two pillars. One goal:
pillars.sub: Every problem has a different solution. We choose the right one.
pillars.card1_sub: Manual processes, blind decisions, time and money slipping away without anyone noticing.
pillars.card1_case_text: A hospital catering company recovered 30% of its food budget and reduced daily production calculations from 30 minutes to 2 minutes.
pillars.card2_title: Your commercial system that never sleeps
pillars.card2_sub: Leads coming in at night, repetitive questions, uncoordinated schedules. Every minute without a response is a lost customer.
pillars.card2_demo_text: Try now how the agent responds to your prospects.

caseHero.heading: This is what results look like
caseHero.title: From food waste to full control across 6 hospitals
caseHero.body1: A hospital catering company managed daily production across 6 facilities manually. Without real-time data, they constantly overproduced — paying for food that was thrown away and wasted chef time.
caseHero.body2: We developed a mobile-first PWA that digitizes the entire production planning process. Chefs operate from their phones; managers see real-time data.

portfolio.headline: Some of the projects we've built
portfolio.sub: Real systems, real clients, measurable results.

demo.heading: This is how the Agent works.
demo.sub: Pick a business type and write as if you were a customer. The agent responds, qualifies, and books in real time.
demo.agent_knows: What the agent knows about this business
demo.explanation_text: While the agent chats with the customer on WhatsApp, all information is automatically logged in the CRM. The business owner sees it in real time without doing anything.
demo.system_message: Write as if you were a customer of this business
demo.clinica_desc: Private clinic · Specialties: pediatrics, internal medicine, gynecology · Appointments from $25 · Open Monday to Saturday
demo.clinica_ctx2_val: From $25 · Exact price depends on specialty
demo.clinica_ctx4_val: The agent books directly or escalates to a human for complex cases
demo.clinica_chip2: I want to book an appointment
demo.clinica_chip3: How much does a consultation cost?
demo.clinica_resp_default: Hi! Welcome to Centro Médico San Rafael. I'm the virtual assistant. How can I help you today? 😊
demo.clinica_resp_servicios:
We offer the following medical specialties:

• 👶 *Pediatrics* — From $25
• 🩺 *Internal Medicine* — From $30
• 👩‍⚕️ *Gynecology* — From $35
• ❤️ *Cardiology* — From $40

All consultations include a full checkup. Would you like to book?
demo.clinica_resp_cita:
Great! To book your appointment I need a few details:

1️⃣ Which specialty do you need?
2️⃣ Do you prefer morning or afternoon?

We have availability this week. 📅
demo.clinica_resp_precio:
Our consultation prices:

• Pediatrics: *$25*
• Internal Medicine: *$30*
• Gynecology: *$35*
• Cardiology: *$40*

💡 Payment is made on the day of the appointment. Would you like to book?
demo.clinica_resp_horario:
Our hours:

🕗 *Monday to Friday:* 8:00am – 6:00pm
🕗 *Saturday:* 8:00am – 2:00pm
🚨 *Emergencies:* until 9:00pm

What time works best for you?
demo.clinica_resp_gracias: Happy to help! Feel free to write us anytime. See you soon. 🙏

demo.cons_desc: AI Sales Engineering · Systems, automation and AI agents · Venezuela and international
demo.cons_ctx1_val: AI Sales Engine, Smart Presence, Smart Commerce
demo.cons_ctx4_val: 25 to 45 days depending on the product
demo.cons_chip3: How much do your services cost?
demo.cons_chip4: How long does a project take?
demo.cons_resp_default: Hi! I'm the nexdevp assistant 👋 We help businesses automate their sales using artificial intelligence. What does your business need?
demo.cons_resp_servicios:
We work with 4 main products:

🌐 *Smart Presence* ($2,200) — Premium web + AI chatbot
🤖 *AI Sales Engine* ($2,800) — AI agent + CRM + WhatsApp
🛒 *Smart Commerce* ($3,200) — Online store + support agent
📈 *Growth Retainer* ($1,200/mo) — Continuous optimization

Which one fits what you're looking for?
demo.cons_resp_cita:
The first consultation is *free* and lasts 20 minutes. We review your situation and tell you exactly what makes sense for your business.

📅 When are you available this week?
demo.cons_resp_precio:
Our products have fixed prices:

• Smart Presence: *$2,200*
• AI Sales Engine: *$2,800* ⭐
• Smart Commerce: *$3,200*
• Monthly retainer: from *$1,200/mo*

💡 First consultation always *free*.
demo.cons_resp_horario:
We're available Monday to Friday 9am to 6pm. The initial consultation is by video call.

🕗 We typically respond in under 2 hours.
demo.cons_resp_gracias: Thanks for reaching out! We'll be in touch. An advisor will contact you soon. 🙏
